code: import React,{useState}from'react';import UploadPage from'./pages/UploadPage';import VerdictPage from'./pages/VerdictPage';import DashboardPage from'./pages/DashboardPage';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function App(){const[screen,setScreen]=useState('upload');const[data,setData]=useState(null);const onResult=d=>{setData(d);setScreen('verdict');};const onContinue=()=>{setScreen('dashboard');};const onReset=()=>{setData(null);setScreen('upload');};if(screen==='upload')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(UploadPage,{onResult:onResult});if(screen==='verdict')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(VerdictPage,{data:data,onContinue:onContinue});if(screen==='dashboard')return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(DashboardPage,{data:data,onReset:onReset});return null;}
